title: erianthus irritans
intro: Erianthus irritans, also known as the 'irritating grass' or 'itch grass', is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Erianthus irritans include its ability to stimulate the skin and cause irritation, making it a traditional treatment for conditions such as eczema and psoriasis. The health benefits of using Erianthus irritans include its ability to increase circulation and promote healing, although it should be used with caution due to its irritating properties. Herbal preparations of Erianthus irritans are typically made by infusing the dried plant material in oil or water to create a topical treatment for skin conditions.
